title: Module 1
content:
Introduction to Medical Robotics: Overview of Medical Robotics:
Definition, Scope, and Importance-Historical Development and Milestones-
Classification of Medical Robots: Surgical, Diagnostic, and Rehabilitation
Robots Components and Architecture of Medical Robots-Safety, Regulatory,
and Ethical Issues in Medical Robotics-Current Trends and Future Directions
in Medical Robotics.

title: Module 2
content:
Introduction to Surgical Robotics:  Definition and Importance-
Components and Architecture of Surgical Robots- Types of Surgical Robotic
Systems: Laparoscopic, Orthopaedic, and Cardiovascular Robots- Image-
Guided Surgery and Integration with Robotic Systems

title: Module 3
content:
Introduction to systems hardware: Introduction to Rehabilitation and
Assistive Robotics- Design and Control of Rehabilitation Robots-Types of
Rehabilitation Robots: Upper Limb, Lower Limb, and Exoskeleton Robots-
Assistive Robots: Robotic Wheelchairs, Prosthetics, and Daily Living Aids-
Impact of Rehabilitation and Assistive Robots on Patient Care

title: Module 4
content:
Introduction to Diagnostic Robotics: Importance and Applications-
Robotic Systems in Medical Imaging: MRI, CT, and Ultrasound Robots- AI
in Medical Robotics: Definition, Importance, and Applications- Integration
of Machine Learning and AI in Robotic Systems- Case Studies: Robotic
Biopsy, AI in Diagnostic Imaging, Robotic Pathology- Challenges and
Future directions in Diagnostic and AI-enhanced Medical Robotic
